# Powell Industries

Powell Industries supplies integrated package solutions, medium-voltage gear, and packaged electrical systems used in utility, industrial, and mission-critical deployments.

## Why it matters
- Strengthens the graph where packaged power has to become actual delivered equipment.
- Helps close the gap between generation strategy, switching logic, and site energization.
- Adds factory-integrated electrical realism to modular AI infrastructure narratives.

## Best fit
- Packaged electrical systems for fast-track compute and industrial buildouts.
- Projects combining modular substations, transfer switching, and on-site distribution.
- Programs where factory integration reduces field complexity.

## Operational role in the graph
- Supports `prefabricated-power-blocks`, `modular-substations`, and `ats-and-transfer-systems` together.
- Connects naturally to `electrical-integration-services` and `field-services-and-maintenance`.
- Makes modular power delivery read like a real procurement-and-installation chain.
